title: Bologna, Emilia-Romagna — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bologna, Emilia-Romagna: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bologna is a city in Emilia-Romagna with a population of 392,000. Italy’s culinary capital, home to the world’s oldest university, with iconic porticoes, rich red-hued architecture, and a vibrant food scene.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
